name: Chocolate Caramel Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Graham Cracker Crust: Combine graham cracker crumbs and melted butter. Press the mixture evenly on the bottom and up the sides of a 9-inch springform pan. Bake at 350°F for 6 to 8 minutes. Cool.
2. Caramel Layer: Combine caramels and milk in a heavy saucepan. Cook over low heat until melted, stirring often. Pour over graham cracker crust. Sprinkle pecans evenly over the caramel layer and set aside.
3. Cream Cheese Filling: Beat cream cheese at high speed with an electric mixer until light and fluffy. Gradually add sugar, mixing well. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition. Stir in vanilla and melted chocolate, beating until blended. Pour over the pecan layer.
4. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes. Remove from oven and run a knife around the edge of the pan to release it. Let cool to room temperature. Cover and chill for 8 hours.
